heading: Application of safe harbor for forward-looking statements
label: 78u–5 Application of safe harbor for forward-looking statements
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (c)(1), (f), and (g), was in the original “this title”. See References in Text note set out under .section 78a of this title

children.text: an issuer that, at the time that the statement is made, is subject to the reporting requirements of or section 78(d) of this title;section 78m(a) of this titleo
a person acting on behalf of such issuer;
an outside reviewer retained by such issuer making a statement on behalf of such issuer; or
an underwriter, with respect to information provided by such issuer or information derived from information provided by such issuer.

children.label: i
children.text: was convicted of any felony or misdemeanor described in clauses (i) through (iv) of section 78(b)(4)(B) of this title; oro

children.label: I
children.text: prohibits future violations of the antifraud provisions of the securities laws;

children.label: II
children.text: requires that the issuer cease and desist from violating the antifraud provisions of the securities laws; or

children.label: III
children.text: determines that the issuer violated the antifraud provisions of the securities laws;

children.label: B
children.text: makes the forward-looking statement in connection with an offering of securities by a blank check company;

children.label: C
children.text: issues penny stock;

children.label: D
children.text: makes the forward-looking statement in connection with a rollup transaction; or

children.label: E
children.text: makes the forward-looking statement in connection with a going private transaction; or

children.label: A
children.text: included in a financial statement prepared in accordance with generally accepted accounting principles;

children.label: B
children.text: contained in a registration statement of, or otherwise issued by, an investment company;

children.label: C
children.text: made in connection with a tender offer;

children.label: D
children.text: made in connection with an initial public offering;

children.label: E
children.text: made in connection with an offering by, or relating to the operations of, a partnership, limited liability company, or a direct participation investment program; or

children.label: F
children.text: made in a disclosure of beneficial ownership in a report required to be filed with the Commission pursuant to .section 78m(d) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: identified as a forward-looking statement, and is accompanied by meaningful cautionary statements identifying important factors that could cause actual results to differ materially from those in the forward-looking statement; or

children.label: ii
children.text: immaterial; or

children.label: i
children.text: if made by a natural person, was made with actual knowledge by that person that the statement was false or misleading; or

children.label: I
children.text: made by or with the approval of an executive officer of that entity; and

children.label: II
children.text: made or approved by such officer with actual knowledge by that officer that the statement was false or misleading.

children.label: i
children.text: that the particular oral statement is a forward-looking statement; and

children.label: ii
children.text: that the actual results might differ materially from those projected in the forward-looking statement; and

children.label: i
children.text: the oral forward-looking statement is accompanied by an oral statement that additional information concerning factors that could cause actual results to materially differ from those in the forward-looking statement is contained in a readily available written document, or portion thereof;

children.label: ii
children.text: the accompanying oral statement referred to in clause (i) identifies the document, or portion thereof, that contains the additional information about those factors relating to the forward-looking statement; and

children.label: iii
children.text: the information contained in that written document is a cautionary statement that satisfies the standard established in paragraph (1)(A).

children.heading: Availability
children.label: 3 Availability
children.text: Any document filed with the Commission or generally disseminated shall be deemed to be readily available for purposes of paragraph (2).

children.heading: Effect on other safe harbors
children.label: 4 Effect on other safe harbors
children.text: The exemption provided for in paragraph (1) shall be in addition to any exemption that the Commission may establish by rule or regulation under subsection (g).

children.heading: Duty to update
children.label: d Duty to update
children.text: Nothing in this section shall impose upon any person a duty to update a forward-looking statement.

children.heading: Dispositive motion
children.label: e Dispositive motion
children.text: On any motion to dismiss based upon subsection (c)(1), the court shall consider any statement cited in the complaint and any cautionary statement accompanying the forward-looking statement, which are not subject to material dispute, cited by the defendant.

children.heading: Stay pending decision on motion
children.label: f Stay pending decision on motion

children.text: the statement or omission upon which the complaint is based is a forward-looking statement within the meaning of this section; and
the exemption provided for in this section precludes a claim for relief.

children.heading: Exemption authority
children.label: g Exemption authority
children.text: In addition to the exemptions provided for in this section, the Commission may, by rule or regulation, provide exemptions from or under any provision of this chapter, including with respect to liability that is based on a statement or that is based on projections or other forward-looking information, if and to the extent that any such exemption is consistent with the public interest and the protection of investors, as determined by the Commission.

children.heading: Effect on other authority of Commission
children.label: h Effect on other authority of Commission
children.text: Nothing in this section limits, either expressly or by implication, the authority of the Commission to exercise similar authority or to adopt similar rules and regulations with respect to forward-looking statements under any other statute under which the Commission exercises rulemaking authority.

children.label: A
children.text: a statement containing a projection of revenues, income (including income loss), earnings (including earnings loss) per share, capital expenditures, dividends, capital structure, or other financial items;

children.label: B
children.text: a statement of the plans and objectives of management for future operations, including plans or objectives relating to the products or services of the issuer;

children.label: C
children.text: a statement of future economic performance, including any such statement contained in a discussion and analysis of financial condition by the management or in the results of operations included pursuant to the rules and regulations of the Commission;

children.label: D
children.text: any statement of the assumptions underlying or relating to any statement described in subparagraph (A), (B), or (C);

children.label: E
children.text: any report issued by an outside reviewer retained by an issuer, to the extent that the report assesses a forward-looking statement made by the issuer; or

children.label: F
children.text: a statement containing a projection or estimate of such other items as may be specified by rule or regulation of the Commission.

children.heading: Investment company
children.label: 2 Investment company
children.text: The term “investment company” has the same meaning as in .section 80a–3(a) of this title

children.heading: Going private transaction
children.label: 3 Going private transaction
children.text: The term “going private transaction” has the meaning given that term under the rules or regulations of the Commission issued pursuant to .section 78m(e) of this title

children.heading: Person acting on behalf of an issuer
children.label: 4 Person acting on behalf of an issuer
children.text: The term “person acting on behalf of an issuer” means any officer, director, or employee of such issuer.

children.heading: Other terms
children.label: 5 Other terms
children.text: The terms “blank check company”, “rollup transaction”, “partnership”, “limited liability company”, “executive officer of an entity” and “direct participation investment program”, have the meanings given those terms by rule or regulation of the Commission.
